◎简　　介  

　　Tommy and Diamond hustle to keep CBI's game ahead of Jenard's new faction in the streets, while Tommywww.inpian.commakes solo moves to avenge Liliana's death; all the while, Tommy hasn't forgotten his ultimate goal to become a kingpin.
